title: Collection of Outstanding Account Receivables Policy
content: Establishes procedures for invoicing sponsors, monitoring outstanding receivables, following up on past-due balances, and writing off uncollectible amounts on sponsored awards. Defines roles and timelines for ORA, the PI, and central finance in collecting sponsor payments. Compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
